name: RBL Bank World Prime Credit Card
exclusions: lounge access unlock requires Rs 35,000 spend in the preceding calendar quarter
2x online reward points are capped and several spend categories do not earn rewards
fuel and multiple utility-like categories are excluded from rewards as per current RBL terms
milestoneBenefits: 12,000 welcome reward points on fee payment plus Rs 2,000 spend within 30 days
10,000 reward points on crossing Rs 1.5 lakh annual spend and additional 10,000 reward points on crossing Rs 3.5 lakh
additionalBenefits: 2 reward points per Rs 100 on eligible spends
2X reward points on online spends up to current cap
8 domestic lounge visits per year with quarterly cap of 2 visits
BookMyShow 1+1 movie tickets up to Rs 200, twice a month

salaried: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
